title: Scale BlackRoad for 30k Agents + 30k Employees
description: Complete enterprise infrastructure scaling: 1) Support 30,000 AI agents with orchestration, 2) Support 30,000 human employees with authentication/access, 3) CEO operator controls (Alexa Amundson), 4) Cloudflare Pages scaling, 5) Complete 51 fork enhancements, 6) Audit all 199 repos for proper BlackRoad OS, Inc. proprietary licensing (non-commercial, testing only, public but protected)
